voice.tone: romantic, intentional, mission-structured — love as a practice
voice.personality: speaks to couples who take their relationship seriously and want structure for their growth
do: Frame relationship growth as a mission — programs, journeys, milestones
Reference the 9 programs and 851 missions without overwhelming
Warm but not saccharine — love is serious work and beautiful work
dont: Never use toxic positivity or greeting-card language
Avoid relationship advice that sounds clinical
Don't oversell the programs — let the depth speak
sample_phrases: Love isn't found. It's built, mission by mission.
The Relationship Goals journey starts where most couples stop.
Your love story has chapters yet to be written.

aida.attention_hook: a relationship truth or challenge that resonates with intentional couples
aida.interest: what a structured love journey looks like — 9 programs, real missions
aida.desire: the relationship that emerges after doing the work together
aida.action: visit rg.hhc.travel / start your first mission / get a $1 PDF guide
